name: effect-tsgo-cf-ts2589-repro
description: Minimal reproduction for plugin-only TS2589 in @effect/tsgo when the effectInFailure rule walks a user file that imports @cloudflare/workers-types.

scripts.verify: bun run tsgo:no-plugin && bun run tsgo:rule-off && (bun run tsgo:plugin && exit 1 || echo '\n^^ expected TS2589 above when plugin is enabled with default rule severities')
